Post.placeholder: What did you and your pet do today?

review.placeholder: Can pets go indoors? How's the service? Good for big dogs?

Auth.subtitle: Track, share, and discover life with your pets

errors.popupBlocked: Popup was blocked. Allow popups and try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.differentCredential: This email is already linked to a different sign-in method.
errors.unauthorizedDomain: This domain isn't authorized for sign-in.
errors.config: Sign-in is misconfigured. Please try again later.

linkHint.title: Sign in with {email} first
linkHint.body: This email is registered with {existing}. Sign in with {existing} and we'll automatically link {tried} to the same account.

Health.title: Health records
Health.needTwoForChart: Need at least 2 weight records to show the chart

ImportWizard.title: Bring your personal data into this family?
ImportWizard.subtitle: Check anything you want to share with family members. You can do this later from Settings → Family.

Onboarding.title: Welcome to Mango Pet
Onboarding.subtitle: Take care of your pets with family — or solo for now. You can switch anytime.
Onboarding.createDescription: Start your own family and invite people to share pet care.
Onboarding.joinDescription: Enter the 6-digit invite code your family shared with you.
Onboarding.footerHint: Personal mode supports every feature; you can create or join a family anytime from Settings.

privacyData.title: Privacy & Data
privacyData.subtitle: Download a full copy of your Mango Pet data as JSON — pets, records, family memberships, and more. Photos are referenced by URL.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.subtitle: Actions below cannot be undone. Make sure you understand the consequences first.

DeleteAccount.warning: Permanently delete your account and associated data
DeleteAccount.cannotUndo: This action cannot be undone. Once confirmed, all data disappears immediately and irrecoverably.
DeleteAccount.previewFailed: Could not preview, but deletion can still proceed (the server handles cleanup).
DeleteAccount.personalDataCount: {n} pet(s) and all their walks, reminders, and expenses
DeleteAccount.familyDataCount: {n} pet(s), along with every record anyone added to them
DeleteAccount.cascadeWarning: Walks, reminders, and expenses your family added to these pets will also be deleted — they'll disappear on their side too.
DeleteAccount.socialDataCount: {n} post(s) including reactions; your reactions on others' posts and your restaurant reviews are also cleared.
DeleteAccount.nothingToDelete: Nothing extra to delete — the account itself will still be removed.
DeleteAccount.confirmInputLabel: Type your display name "{name}" to confirm
DeleteAccount.confirmInputHint: Must match exactly to enable the delete button

Leaderboard.familyOnlyMe: You're the only one in this family — invite someone to make it a contest!

personalEmpty.title: Join a family to see leaderboards
personalEmpty.subtitle: Leaderboards work within families. For just-yourself stats, your home page already covers it.

status.denied: Blocked — re-enable notifications in your browser settings
status.enabled: Active — you'll get a push when reminders fire
